pitfalls.title: Feature leakage and decision-visibility contract
symptoms: future labels appear in observation features
execution-only fields are visible at decision time
date filtering or windowing silently drops expected rows
why_risky: can invalidate offline results without obvious runtime failure
check_before_edit: re-open leakage check helpers
confirm no future label or execution field enters observation
confirm date_index and full-window behavior
safe_observation_methods: inspect assert_decision_visibility_contract call sites
run data-focused pytest before broader edits

pitfalls.title: Action and state contract coupling across env, agents, and baselines
symptoms: ERR_STRATEGY_ACTION_CONTRACT
ERR_STRATEGY_STATE_CONTRACT
ERR_ACTION_SHAPE_MISMATCH
ERR_STATE_SCHEMA_MISMATCH
trigger_actions: edit strategy or agent return payloads
why_risky: multiple module families share the same runtime contract
check_before_edit: re-open state.py before changing payload fields
confirm strategy compute_target_weights return contract
confirm env action dict keys and tensor shapes
safe_observation_methods: compare contracts against visible tests
verify all changed call sites in current subtree

pitfalls.title: Delayed execution and pending-action branch split
symptoms: pending actions never execute
execution_date and decision_date drift
ERR_EXECUTION_DATE_OUT_OF_RANGE
why_risky: env and backtest each branch on delayed execution semantics
check_before_edit: confirm PENDING_TRUNCATION_REASON semantics
trace pending queue append/pop paths
verify scheduler reset and pre_check/post_check assumptions
safe_observation_methods: inspect both immediate and delayed branches before edit
run env and backtest regression together

pitfalls.title: Backtest and baseline artifact schema rigidity
symptoms: baseline output schema tests fail
aggregators or import scripts stop reading outputs
column order or naming drift in daily artifact tables
trigger_actions: edit import/export scripts for backtest artifacts
why_risky: schema constants are centralized and reused by multiple workflows
check_before_edit: confirm all schema consumers inside current subtree
preserve column ordering unless task explicitly changes schema
verify tests and import/export scripts together
safe_observation_methods: inspect DAILY_*_COLUMNS and test expectations first
run schema-focused pytest set

pitfalls.title: Absolute root constant and data overwrite risk in ops scripts
symptoms: script writes to a fixed absolute project path
generated parquet or csv files overwrite existing data
relocated subtree still writes to original path
why_risky: script bypasses cwd-relative routing and writes to multiple data directories
check_before_edit: inspect ROOT and DATA_DIR constants
confirm write targets remain under current subtree
check overwrite behavior before destructive writes
safe_observation_methods: dry-run resolved paths before network fetch or file write
treat remote fetch endpoint behavior as out_of_scope

pitfalls.title: Partial rebalance mode to DQN output-dimension coupling
symptoms: ERR_PARTIAL_REBALANCE_MODE_INVALID
ERR_PARTIAL_GATE_OUTPUT_DIM_INVALID
ERR_POLICY_SHAPE_MISMATCH
gate output shape mismatch in downstream agents
why_risky: mode selection rewrites output dimensions and joint log-prob logic
check_before_edit: trace mode branch to output_dim forcing
confirm downstream expectations for gate_action and intensity_log_prob
re-check relevant experiment yaml values
safe_observation_methods: inspect model file and direct consumers together
run gate and agent tests as one regression set

pitfalls.title: Raw model rebalance intent and final execution action must stay distinct
symptoms: model appears to rebalance every day after threshold or scheduler logic should block trades
raw gate action is treated as raw_model_requested_rebalance before turnover threshold filtering
scheduler-blocked days are logged as model_chosen_hold instead of preserving raw intent
template index values leak into binary gate_action fields
hold template returns an all-zero initial portfolio target
trigger_actions: edit binary gate or template-based baseline strategies
edit backtest scheduler or final action diagnostics
edit gate_action, raw_gate_requested_rebalance, raw_model_requested_rebalance, raw_action, raw_rho, final_action, or rebalance_intensity fields
why_risky: paper turnover metrics and scheduler diagnostics depend on distinguishing raw model intent from final executable trades
raw_gate_requested_rebalance preserves the model's pre-threshold gate output, while raw_model_requested_rebalance is the post-threshold pre-scheduler execution request
binary gate, template index, partial rho, and scheduler-final action share similar field names but have different semantics
check_before_edit: inspect _continuous_weight_rebalance_decision and _binary_gate_rebalance_decision before changing gate behavior
confirm raw_gate_requested_rebalance is not used as raw_model_requested_rebalance before turnover threshold filtering
confirm raw_* diagnostics preserve model intent across threshold and scheduler finalization
confirm gate_action is binary final action and template_action_index stores non-binary template ids
confirm initial empty portfolio hold paths build a valid first position
safe_observation_methods: run targeted baseline gate tests before broad experiment reruns
compare raw_gate_requested_rebalance, raw_model_requested_rebalance, final_action, forced_hold_reason, and realized_turnover together
run agent passthrough tests when adding or renaming diagnostic fields

pitfalls.title: Activity gate and promotion eligibility must block formal selection
symptoms: activity-failed HPO trial is selected as best, median, worst, or equal-budget winner
P16 formal or final waiter starts after promotion_gate_report.csv has no passing row
CAGE or GT-RCPO reports a rebalance while executed turnover remains below active floor
learned rho policy collapses to zero without normalized gate activity fallback
trigger_actions: edit HPO best-trial or final-report selection
edit CAGE, GT-RCPO, or RA-GT-RCPO gate helpers
edit P16 paper automation waiter scripts
edit final_activity_failure_reason, activity_turnover_floor_applied, or learned_rho_policy_adjustment_reason fields
why_risky: formal paper results depend on activity-passed trials and promotion gates, not only finite validation score
turnover-active conclusions are invalid if low-activity trials or failed promotion gates can enter formal outputs
check_before_edit: confirm final_activity_failure_reason filters HPO payload and final report selection
confirm activity floor is skipped for hold and first-trade paths
confirm promotion_gate_report.csv failed status prevents formal/final waiter startup
confirm learned rho zero fallback records learned_rho_policy_adjustment_reason
safe_observation_methods: run tests/test_hpo_activity_metric.py for HPO selection changes
run tests/test_cage_gate_scoring.py and tests/test_p16_ra_gt_rcpo.py for activity floor or learned rho fallback changes
run bash -n scripts/exp40d_p16_final_early.sh after waiter script edits

pitfalls.title: Replay buffer transition schema and CQR gate consistency must stay aligned
symptoms: ReplayItem construction fails after adding transition fields
as_batch omits fields consumed by CQR gate training
checkpoint restore drops replay-buffer transition payloads
gate=0 or gate=1 transitions mismatch executed versus candidate weights
trigger_actions: edit prioritized replay n-step commit behavior
edit checkpoint replay-buffer serialization or restore
why_risky: training, resume, and CQR gate diagnostics share the same replay transition payload
check_before_edit: confirm ReplayItem defaults and to_dict/as_batch key parity
confirm q_gap_t equals q_rebalance_t minus q_hold_t when present
confirm checkpoint replay-buffer state round-trips changed fields
safe_observation_methods: run tests/test_buffers.py and tests/test_checkpoint.py together
inspect ReplayBuffer.validate_cqr_fields before changing gate transition fields

pitfalls.title: OTAR S0 protocol freeze and formal matrix must stay canonical
symptoms: ERR_OTAR_S0_PROTOCOL_HASH_DRIFT_POST_FREEZE
ERR_OTAR_V2_FULL_UNFROZEN_MATRIX
ERR_OTAR_S0_GRID_TEST_PEEKING_NOT_BLOCKED
ERR_OTAR_S0_SCHEMA_FORBIDDEN_FIELDS_INCOMPLETE
formal run starts from a non-canonical matrix or unmanaged config
trigger_actions: change protocol_id, data_cutoff_date, RUN_CONFIGS, HPO grids, or schema_freeze fields
why_risky: OTAR formal outputs are only comparable when the frozen S0 config, schema, grid, and formal matrix set stay internally consistent
post-freeze managed-file drift must bump protocol_id instead of silently reusing old lineage
check_before_edit: run scripts/validate_otar_s0_protocol.py before and after managed config changes
confirm canonical matrix path and frozen run config set
confirm schema_freeze forbidden aliases and no-test-peeking grid flags remain present
safe_observation_methods: use dry-run OTAR full pipeline tests for orchestration edits
inspect generated outputs only as artifacts, not as protocol truth

pitfalls.title: OTAR CQR gate risk-state, replay, and diagnostics schemas must stay aligned
symptoms: ERR_OBSERVATION_RISK_STATE_MISSING
ERR_CQR_REPLAY_ITEM_MISSING_FIELD
ERR_CQR_GATE_CONSISTENCY
tail calibration reports forbidden_calibration_label or missing boundary fields
daily diagnostics use forbidden CVaR field aliases instead of lower-tail/soft-tail names
trigger_actions: edit RiskStateManager observation fields or model.use_risk_state handling
edit OTarCQRGate candidate/hold utility, lower-tail quantile fields, or gate_margin behavior
edit OTarCQRGateStrategy replay item construction or cost estimation
edit backtest daily diagnostics, schema_freeze, TailCalibrator, or replay buffer CQR fields
why_risky: OTAR policy, environment, replay buffer, output schema, and calibration code share the same risk-state and CQR diagnostics field contract
candidate, hold, raw gate, executed gate, and pre-trade drifted weights have distinct semantics used by cost, replay, and paper tables
blast_radius: tail calibration and paper aggregate tables
check_before_edit: confirm RiskStateManager keeps an 8-element observation vector and matching diagnostics keys
confirm ReplayItem CQR fields and as_batch keys stay in parity with OTarCQRGateStrategy
confirm schema_freeze uses lower-tail/soft-tail names and keeps forbidden CVaR aliases blocked
confirm TailCalibrator only uses validation/test rows with episode_id, timestep, done_t, split, executed_gate_action, and predicted_5pct_quantile_executed
safe_observation_methods: run OTAR CQR, replay, risk-state, reward-accounting, and tail-calibration tests together
compare candidate_weights_json, pre_trade_drifted_weights_json, executed_gate_action, predicted_5pct_quantile_executed, and cost_estimation_error_t together
